title: Creeper Recharged
description: An elegant new look for the Creeper!
body:
**Creeper Recharged** was inspired by **Minecraft's leaves** and **promotional material for the game (or merchandise)**, to give the **Creepers** a modern touch while keeping a somewhat similar design to the original ones.

![New Creeper Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d79bd4fbc591a9ae19e0c68158f409fa42de7f03.png)
